vBRIEFInfo.author: agent:warp-oz
vBRIEFInfo.description: Display org name alongside user activity across the site

plan.title: Display Org Name Alongside User Activity

items.title: Phase 1a: Add OrgMembershipWithOrg response type; enrich GetUser

narrative.Problem: GetUser returns memberships with raw org_id only; need org_name + org_slug via JOIN

items.title: Phase 1b: Add primary_org_name/slug to ListUsers response

narrative.Problem: ListUsers returns bare UserShadow with no org context; need LEFT JOIN for primary org

items.title: Phase 3: Show org badge on admin users list rows
Phase 4: Show org name + link in memberships table
Phase 5 (stretch): Org context on messages, audit, reports, CRM

narrative.Problem: Lower priority — depends on backend enrichment or client-side lookup cache
